candidate.completion: lower your standards until my personality counts.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards until my personality counts.

evaluation.rationale: A clear self-deprecating pivot turns the plea into an admission about desirability, and the logic lands cleanly. The idea is compact and recognizable, but the phrasing is more neat than razor-sharp, so it stops short of feeling fully quotable or elegant.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
